theScene: But before you can actually set to exploring the sprawling city, your train of thought is interrupted by the noise of someone's quickly approaching heeled stride clicking against the pavement, the sound drawing your gaze to the arriving newcomer as they cheerfully call out to you.
Hiiiii.♪ You're a freshly arrived adventurer, right?♪ You're cute... But don't worry, I'm not going to try and gobble you up.♪

You can't help but feel like there's a lingering 'yet' in her reassuring words as she breezily laughs while continuing to approach you, giving you a moment to take in her downright overwhelming figure: in contrast to her sweetly high-pitched voice, the woman is {i}big{/i}, easily standing a head or two above the surrounding passersby, and the luxurious mane of curly blond hair that cascades behind her and frames her body makes her seem even larger.

But more prominent of all are her incredibly endowed breasts, the showily purple bodysuit they're tightly packed into doing nothing to diminish their size, much less their heft as they wobble eye-catchingly with every step the tall lady takes, irresistibly drawing your vision to their mesmerizingly shaking mass, and almost making you miss the horns and tail that unmistakably reveal their owner to be a succubus.

The beaming newcomer, meanwhile, appears to either not notice your staring or not mind it, energetically taking the last few strides that separate you from her before stopping in front of you with a lazy, overexerted sigh, brushing one of her very long locks of hair away from her warmly smiling face while fanning herself with a magazine she's idly holding in her other hand.
Haaahh... I really wish they would let me just set up a lawn chair by the entrance. It gets really tiring standing around all day long...

Emphatically pouting, she looks tempted to go on a tirade against whoever set up the regulations she seems to be constrained by, but whatever she has to say on the subject, she ultimately keeps to herself as she instead segues with a prim smile.

But anyways!♪ You're [ThePlayerName], right?♪ My name is Heather, and I've been assigned to guide, judge, and oversee your acquisition of the Sigil of Intelligence in Ars Delusia. A pleasure to make your acquaintance.♪

In a moment, you've recognized Heather, one of the succubus campers you met back on the Mountain, her very {i}unmistakable{/i} silhouette having remained quite indelibly in your mind, as has her cheerful attitude... The bodysuit, however, is certainly new.

Seeming to identify you just as quickly, the familiar heavily stacked woman starts, stalling a moment in surprise as she looks you up and down as if to make sure she's not just imagining things, her slowing steps only accentuating the bounce of her heavy, bodysuit-restrained assets as she exclaims.
Oh my! [ThePlayerName]! Fancy running into you like this...♪

Seeming nonetheless quite happy to see you, the smiling succubus takes the last few steps between the two of you at a much more relaxed, almost lazy pace, using one hand to flick a lock of hair out of her face while the other idly fiddles with a magazine she's holding.
It's quite the coincidence, but I've been assigned to be your guide and judge for the acquisition of the Sigil of Intelligence here in the Capital. Small world, hm?♪

Feeling a bit taken aback by the abrupt appearance, you wonder how you should react to this surprise meeting, but before you can actually do or say anything, she holds up a hand, seeming to be aware of your confusion and requesting your patience.

Oh, but before you ask anything, please let me run you through the introduction to the Sigil of Intelligence Hunt, since it may answer several of the questions you most likely have. And once I'm done, you can ask me anything else you want. Alright?♪

Her voice brims with warm open affection, forming an odd but not unpleasant mixture with her clipped professional tone as she speaks, her small spaded tail meanwhile idly swaying and brushing against her long, heavy drill-shaped locks of golden hair, giving her a relaxedly casual vibe that complements her decidedly friendly attitude and encourages you to play along by signaling her to continue.

Nodding contently at your cooperation, she reaches into the magazine that she seems to have been using as an ad-hoc storage medium in addition to a source of distraction, taking out a small card with empty boxes printed onto it which she hands you.

Here's how it works: you need to fill this blank card with stamps from across the Capital's districts (not all implemented yet).♪ There is a total of seven stamps, one for each district, but you only need three/four (not yet final) to qualify.

To get a stamp, you need to complete some kind of challenge, trial, puzzle, or something else of that nature somewhere in one of the districts. It's a sort of treasure hunt meant to be a test of your wits, or more to the point, your {i}intelligence{/i}.♪

But of course, you won't be left to wander around aimlessly: I have one tip to give you for each district's stamp, and I {i}really{/i} encourage you to pay attention to them if you want to make progress... Though I'll also admit that even I can't figure out some of them, haha.♪

You can't help but feel that this doesn't bode well, though Heather herself doesn't seem concerned as she carries on brightly, animatedly gesturing at the sprawling metropolis around you with her magazine while adding cheerfully.

But don't worry: just think of it as a special tour of all the wonders of Ars Delusia, where you get to pick your favorite locales to explore and enjoy, all the while making progress on your adventurer's journey.♪

With that out of the way, she pauses for a long moment, languidly stretching in place with a lazy yawn that incidentally hefts up her outfit-straining bust, making it showily press against her bodysuit's sheer fabric until she untenses with an idle huff, leaving her ample bosom free to bounce back down with an eye-catching wobble while she lets out an 'Oh!' as another thought occurs to her.

Also, there's something else I should mention: each stamp is unique, so don't think about trying to fill every slot of that card I gave you with the same one stamp... And don't try to forge the stamps either. Believe me, {i}we'll know{/i}, and trying to pull that kind of stunt to cheat the system might get you 'disqualified' entirely, so I {i}really{/i} don't recommend attempting it.

Somehow, despite the formal and stern nature of her words, she manages to keep her tone downright jovial as she goes through the warnings and caveats, making them sound like no more than a boring formality and leaving her smiling as sunnily as before, though her face scrunches up in thought as she taps her chin with her rolled-up magazine and muses.
Hum, let's see now... What else was there again...

Ah, {i}right.♪{/i} Don't act naughty by staying out wandering the streets for too long. Not that there's anything {i}officially{/i} against it, but Ars Delusia gets quite dangerous the longer the night goes on: as you're doubtless aware of by now, monster girls get {i}hungrier{/i} at night, so the later you stay out, the more likely you'll be to encounter ravenous locals and who knows what else.♥
Her eyes opening briefly to show off her attractively limpid-blue irises, she waggles her eyebrows suggestively, though she quickly recovers her previous seriousness and carries on smoothly.

Nevertheless, note that the Eros District is {i}always{/i} a safe place where nobody will try to fuck you silly... Well, unless you ask them to, but I think we'll agree that in that case, that'd be on you. Point is: should you ever need to take a break or resupply, keep in mind that you can always come back here to do so.♪
And if you're ever feeling lost on what to do in the Capital, or just have questions, come find me in the Eros District, and I can take {i}good{/i} care of you.♪

Again, she gives you that same suggestive look, and you're not sure whether she's coming on to you, purposefully tempting you, or just being flirtatious, though once more, she leaves the seductive innuendo at that, taking a moment to think things over before concluding brightly.

Speaking of which: this wraps up your introduction to the Sigil of Intelligence Hunt!♪ You can now let me know if you have anything to ask, or if you want to hear any of those stamp hints I mentioned.♪
... Unless I interrupted you in the middle of something, in which case feel free to go back to it and come see me later. I'll always be around.♪

She finishes her rather lengthy introduction to your situation in the Capital with a warm, lazy smile, her calm eyes remaining closed in restful amiability and her small spaded tail swishing behind her idly as she awaits your response.

With the tall succubus' strikingly purple bodysuit and voluminous blonde hair making her stand out even in the midst of the busy shopping district crossing, it's not hard for you to spot then approach her, the cheerful ADS agent perking up and giving you a lazy welcoming wave once she has noticed your approach.
'Can you give me some extra tips?'
'Do you know anything about the Demonic Convergence that happened here?'
'You don't seem like the type to work in security.'
Very well.♪ Have fun exploring Ars Delusia!♪
The latex-clad succubus speaks with her habitual relaxed, comforting warmth, and gives you a lazy parting wave as you walk away.
Heather giggles in amusement for a moment, holding a hand up to her mouth with unusual daintiness at your doubtful query.

Of course!♪ I myself work as part of a special department of Ars Delusian Security that helps manage Sigil distribution. We set up and maintain challenges, make sure that adventurers don't face undue ordeals across their adventures, regulate monster girl activity, settle disputes and abuses, and much more.♪

Speaking with proud primness, she takes out a small card from a pocket on her very tight bodysuit and shows it to you, the crisp-looking badge consisting of a very official-looking piece of documentation displaying her name, her employee number, a logo spelling out 'ADS', and a picture of her face with a much more serious expression and smoldering gaze, her open blue eyes piercing into the camera.
Once you've had the time to peruse the quite formal ID, she tucks the card away again, and adds with a giggle.
Though I'm sure I stand out quite a bit from the Security Voltlins, heehee.♪

But also, don't let all the official decorum intimidate you: so long as you're not a bad law-breaking boy, neither I nor the rest of the ADS will have any reason to get in your way. And we're quite used to adventurers being rather out of their element here, so don't worry: as long as you're not {i}purposefully{/i} being naughty, you'll be fine.♪
She speaks with quite the jovial and playful lilt in her voice before humming in thought for a moment, then briefly opening her eyes fully to stare at you a bit more seriously.
Though to be abundantly clear: as I mentioned, being 'naughty' goes double for trying to cheat on the Sigil Hunt.
Seeming assured that you'll take that as read, she then mellows out in an instant, easing right back into her usual casualness with another warm giggle.

But as I said, don't feel stressed out about that: with how loose and permissive the rules are, it {i}should{/i} be basically impossible for you to end up accidentally cheating.♪ So don't let any concerns get in the way of you poking around and trying things.♪ You're even free to ask the locals around for help figuring things out.♪
Letting that gentle assurance drift through the air with the lingering sweetness of her voice, she fixes you relaxedly with her habitual nearly closed gaze, waiting patiently for your next question.
Oh, well, I can't {i}exactly{/i} go ahead and spoil everything for you now, can I?
Giggling at her playful answer, she lets the mock-chiding response sink in, mischievously remaining silent for a few seconds before rather quickly relenting and adding.

But since you're curious... Well, aside from the little riddles you'll need to unravel in order to get to each district's stamp, you should expect quite the number of lusty women who will test your battlefucking prowess. In fact, in some cases, it will be all that obtaining the stamp will entail, while other stamp challenges will be more of the... brain-teasing variety.♪

While she speaks, Heather's blue eyes slowly open to give you a smoldering stare as she takes hold of her bodysuit's zipper and oh-so slowly drags it down, teasingly revealing her deep cleavage bit by bit, the loosening restraints letting her heavy tits strain forward obscenely, threatening to spill out entirely while her sweet, feminine pheromones drift into the open air, tantalizingly tickling your senses while she casually goes on.

And {i}of course{/i}, along the way, you should expect {i}other{/i} kinds of 'brain teasing' as well, with all manners of tricks, traps, and temptations to lead you astray.♥ The kind that will make you want to stop thinking and just {i}enjoy{/i} the moment instead.♥

Tittering sultrily, the big succubus idly sways in place as she talks in her caressingly cadenced singsong, the gentle rocking of her indulgently curvy body making her sinfully huge bosom jiggle salaciously in front of you, wordlessly inviting you to forget about anything else but their eye-catching heft and intoxicating plushness...

Then she suddenly zips her bodysuit back up with a cheery chuckle and a warm smile, her expression returning all at once to one of jovial friendliness while her heavy bust bounces snugly from the reconfinement, the not-so-innocent agent meanwhile carrying on as if nothing happened.
But yeah, do keep in mind that each district's challenge is different.♪ So if you get stuck on one challenge or don't like it, you're free to go somewhere else to try for a different one.♪

And even though I previously mentioned it, I'll mention it again since it's important: remember that the city only gets livelier at night.♪ Whether you want to avoid the extra danger or you're the type who likes to challenge himself, that's an important factor to take into account... Though you won't get any special prizes for putting yourself in extra danger, so don't go and purposefully make things harder for you either, okay?♪
... Unless you're into that, of course.♥

Beaming gently, she pauses for a long moment, seeming ready to wrap up that answer and let you proceed with another question, though she then belatedly lets out a small 'Ah!' of realization and adds in her sweet voice.

Also! You may want to keep in mind that night here doesn't end normally. It will just keep going on and on, with your opponents becoming no less horny for it.♥ So be ready to face quite the {i}taxing{/i} opposition until you manage to find somewhere you can sleep or rest properly in order to pass the time.

... And before you ask: no, Ars Delusian citizens who don't go to sleep after nightfall aren't forever caught in a never-ending night. That only applies to adventurers. I'm... actually not {i}entirely sure{/i} how it works, to be honest. Lucidia can be a weird place at the best of times, and the Demon Queen's top scientists sure have been able to work some crazy wonders with the local magic...
Though even if I {i}did{/i} know, I bet it's classified information, so I wouldn't be able to tell you anyway.♪
Truly seeming to have quite the nonchalant attitude towards things that escape her purview, Heather dismisses the topic with an idle toss of her luxuriously long hair, and concludes breezily.

Overall, the most important thing to remember is: if you find the night going on and on and things are getting dicey, look for somewhere nice and safe to rest.♪ Else, who knows what might happen to you, hehe.♪

EventText.NameOfScene: 'Can you give me some extra tips?'
theScene: Mmmh, I know we're friends, but that would be rather... {i}unprofessional{/i}. And I would say I'm already giving you plenty of advice and help as your guide, [ThePlayerName].♪
Her mild surprise evening back into a warm, caring smile, the big succubus giggles comfortingly while giving your arm an encouraging pat.

No matter how needy for help you might get, there's only so much I can do. And I certainly can't hold your hand through your trials either, no matter how much you might like the idea of a tall mature woman spoiling you.♥

Heather fixes you with a half-lidded, smoldering gaze as she delivers the barely concealed innuendo, a creeping sense of erotic danger tingling across the back of your neck as her smile further widens and she continues in an almost purring voice.

And while I {i}do{/i} appreciate your trust, you should be careful with how much you rely on me. Remember: I'm here as an ADS agent, and this is an official challenge, so don't be afraid to see me as an 'obstacle', even if we're otherwise friends.
Then, as soon as the perilously sultry atmosphere settled, it vanishes as the breezy lady perks back up with a cheery smile and a happy clap of her hands.
Oh!♪ I just thought of a good tip I can give you, though! {i}Relax, and have fun.♪{/i}
Some tip it is, but it's quite clear this is all Heather is going to give you, the statuesque succubus laughing proudly at her innocuous ribbing while awaiting your next query.
Heather seems surprised at the personal question out of the blue, but not bothered by it, answering with her customary cheerfulness.

Oh!♪ Well, if you want to go and meet up with either of them at work, Cathy's at a store called 'Impeccable Taste', though you'll need to ask around a bit for her, since I don't think she does customer service anymore. As for Jen, she's in the Aphrodesia District, at Club Mirage. You should go and watch her dance sometime, it's quite the show.♪(Not yet implemented.)
The mention of her friends seeming to have further brightened up her already quite sunny mood, she giggles happily, and muses.

Maybe sometime, the four of us can all meet up for dinner... or maybe a movie?♪ Though whenever we have free time, we usually just end up going camping to get some time away from the city, and you already know where to find us in the Mountain, hehe.♪

Having been slipping back into an even more casual behavior than she's already been displaying even in the middle of work, the tall succubus catches herself and smoothes back into a more professional demeanor, concluding with a smooth smile.
But friends aside, do you have any adventure or work-related questions to ask? I could chat about whatever all day, but I can't slack off on duty, even if I'd want to.♪
She titters breezily at the playful admission, but leaves it at that, letting you go back to your questions.

EventText.NameOfScene: 'Do you know anything about the Demonic Convergence that happened here?'
theScene: Looking like she hadn't expected you to suddenly bring up something like that, Heather gazes at you for a moment in frozen surprise, as if innerly searching for what you mean or how to respond, then she slumps with a sigh and gives you a sad look, answering in an uncustomarily muted voice compared to her usual breezy singsong.
Right, you {i}were{/i} there, you and that poor slime girl... That sure was quite the event for your first time in Ars Delusia.

The statuesque succubus sports a sour face as she fiddles for a moment with her abundant hair, looking pensively at the plaza where Perpetua's transformation and your ensuing battle took place. Even though the area has been thoroughly cleaned of anything that might hint at a battle having ever taken place there, the memory is still vivid in your mind, as it seems to be in Heather's.
Nevertheless, she's clearly not letting that bring her down, her expression returning to one of her habitual prim little smiles as she turns back to you, carrying on in a less somber tone.
I'm certainly familiar with it, because even though I wouldn't blame you for not noticing in the middle of all the... excitement, I was actually there.♪

Since I'd been assigned to you as your Intelligence Sigil Hunt guide, I was going to approach you about it as soon as you set foot into the city, but seeing as you and your cute friend had some ongoing rivalry business to take care of, I figured it would be best to give you the space to sort it out. I didn't want to be rude, you know... So instead, I went and got some ice cream.♪

While the amusing anecdote brings her back to her usual relaxed cheer for a moment, she then pauses with reflective somberness as she gets to what happened {i}next{/i}, the whole incident certainly being a far cry from sweet treats and friendly antics.

And then... Well, you know what happened. It feels like I only looked away for a moment, then when I returned, everything had gone to hell in a handbasket... It really felt like I'd messed up, and like I could have helped avoid the whole debacle if I had been more vigilant, but my superiors told me it's unlikely I could have intervened in time or even done much to actually stop it all, even if I had been watching you both like a hawk...

But anyway, back to when it all happened. Even though I could no longer do anything to stop the Convergence, nor was there any way to breach that big energy dome you and your friend were trapped in, I was still a professional ADS agent, so I set to helping people evacuate and bringing security on site, then on getting everyone organized to be ready to take care of whatever was going to come out.

Sadly, I couldn't be involved in that either. Even though my magic is electricity-based and therefore has similarities with the voltlins', it's not {i}quite{/i} the same, so me joining them would have done more harm than good.
Again, she sighs with a bit of rueful petulance, but again, she dismisses the bad vibes with a shrug, her face going back to its sunny disposition as she gazes upon you with a congratulatory smile.

But at the end of the day, you handled it all quite splendidly anyway, didn't you? Disarmed the issue before it blossomed into some kind of full-on disaster, kept any onlookers from getting too closely involved and caught in the crossfire, and even managed to get the victim-slash-perpetrator out of it safe and sound.♪ So good job.♪

Casually, the tall succubus raises a hand, looking quite obviously about to reflexively pat your head. However, she realizes halfway through the gesture that it could be somewhat inappropriate, and thus instead turns it into a friendly shoulder squeeze while she goes on with a little grimace.

...The security team is still sorry for zapping you like that after all your hard work, by the way... Even though they were only following the standard procedure for dealing with potential high-scale threats, I know it still sucks to be on the receiving end of {i}that{/i} kind of magic.
Chuckling compassionately, she gives your shoulder another comforting pat before retracting her hand and returning to an idly restful posture.

But anyway, that about covers the topic. And as you've already had your debriefing with one of my colleagues, there's not much else I can add on the subject. It's a fairly confidential matter, so I can't just spill everything, even to a professional adventurer who was directly involved in the incident.

It's actually lucky I can say this much right now, hehe.♪ Usually, when asked about sensitive information, I have to go through the whole officialese rigmarole. You know: 'Unfortunately, this is not a topic I'm at liberty of discussing, but should you have any questions, please contact the Ars Delusian Security offices for inquiries.'

Heather giggles at her own exaggeratedly monotone monologue, then her blue eyes open briefly as she gives you a sweet but serious gaze, her lazy carefree vibes suddenly fading as she adds professionally.

Though of course, it {i}is{/i} serious business. So keep in mind that if you ever learn or see anything related to such dangerous events or to any kind of illegal activity, please let the ADS know immediately. After all, even though it may be something as innocuous as a crook making Eros on the sly or settling a petty grudge, it might also be something much more severe that could easily pose a danger to both monsters and humans.

With that out of the way, she then lets out a relaxed exhale and returns to her familiar warm smile as her posture loosens back, her heavy bodysuit-clad bust lazily wobbling side to side with the idle movement while she muses.
Mmmh, speaking of which, once we're done chatting, maybe I should go and treat myself to some ice cream.♪
... At which point she perks up in realization, suddenly straightening up with an alluring jiggle of her ample bosom.
{b}Oh!{/b} That reminds me! I actually have something for you! Just wait here!
Striding off, she goes to one of the nearby security booths, spending just a moment there to apparently retrieve something which she returns with and briskly puts into your hand.
There you go.♪ With the compliments and apologies of the ADS's voltlins... Unofficial ones, though, so please don't go ahead and purposefully get yourself in trouble hoping for more apology gifts.♪

Looking down at the object in your grasp while the succubus chuckles playfully at her quip, you see that it is an opaque metal canister that comfortably fits in your palm, and which seems to be a food item judging by the garish pictures painted on it, the pull-tab used to open it, and the sloshing liquid it audibly contains.

In addition, it is covered with a large sticky note bearing several messages in various handwritings, which are to the effect of: 'Sorry for zapping you!', 'Good job dealing with the DemCon, champion adventurer!', 'Have a nice time in Ars Delusia!', 'Good luck with the Sigil Hunt!', '{s}If you're looking for a good time, come find me at{/s}', 'Calm your tits, this isn't a dating service!!!'
Giggling with what seems to be genuine fondness at her colleagues' gesture, Heather adds as you stash away your present.

They {i}really{/i} felt bad about giving you such a treatment even though you hadn't done anything wrong and you'd even helped resolve the crisis... And I'm also {i}pretty sure{/i} that you caught a few eyes, too.♪ Congratulations, Mister Popular.♥

Letting out a quite succubus-like titter steeped in undisguised suggestiveness, she looks at you in a way that can't help but send a twinge of enticing lust through your spine, though the lecherous expression is short-lived, the towering woman smoothly returning to her usual casualness as she concludes.
Mh? Oh, you mean the one I mentioned!
The big lady giggles fondly at your sweet-toothed curiosity, and hums in thought for a moment before going on.
Well, it's {i}really{/i} not a question that has anything to do with the Sigil Hunt... But sure, I don't mind telling you.♪

She proceeds to give you directions to an ice cream parlor in the Eros District, with said directions ending up being {i}very{/i} specific, the shop apparently eschewing any kind of billboard, sign, or window display, making Heather's instructions quite vital to find the place should you wish to give it a try next time you go looking for food.
It's almost literally a hole in the wall, so don't be surprised by the... {i}frugality{/i} when you get there... And also don't be put off by the owner's quirks. The flavor is really worth it.♪

With that glowing endorsement, she leaves the topic at that, looking actually tempted to go on, but making a visible effort to remain professional and let you carry on with your inquiries instead of chattering on.
Hm? You want to know about my magic?

Raising a palm, she makes a current of bright-yellow electricity course through it, then has the steady electric arc bounce playfully from one finger to another, the controlled display seeming to barely require any concentration on her part as she singsongs nonchalantly.
It's nothing too special, really. I just have an affinity for it, so it was easy for me to get good at it.♪

As she speaks, she squeezes her elegant hand into a fist, ending the demonstration which leaves behind it a strangely enticing, sweet ozone-like smell, the magic being quite clearly influenced by her succubus nature, though to what extent, you can't help but wonder...

And in fact, as if in response to your unspoken thought, Heather lets out a pouty huff that casts a faint shadow on her overt pride and cheer, crossing her arms over her ample bust in a show of vexation while continuing.

Though if I'm fully honest, it's not {i}really{/i} my thing. It's not like a voltlin's magic, which is much better for 'fun' things. It's just regular ole lightning magic, the likes of which you're probably familiar with yourself. And, well... while there's spells like Electrify which {i}do{/i} have sexy applications, I'm not really fond of using it like that. I'm more for making people feel {i}good{/i}, you know?♥
With that almost erotic upswing in her tone towards the end, she is soon back to her usual lazily cheerful self, her stance easing back into a casually relaxed one as she keeps speaking.

But don't get me wrong: being able to wield electricity {i}is{/i} useful! Powering devices, fixing the occasional machine without the need to call for a professional, giving a voltlin a pick-me-up, party tricks... or even harmless pranks like gently zapping someone so all their hair stands on end.♪

As if to exemplify once more, she raises her indexes on either side of her body this time, and has an electric current flow between them and assume the shape of a luminous heart, keeping it like that with almost no oscillation while she goes on.
Overall, though, I {i}much{/i} prefer my innate succubus abilities and magic.♥

Giggling, she brings the bright heart up to her face and breathes on it while cutting off the flow of lightning, giving the impression that she's blowing it off towards you as she simultaneously conjures a little floaty heart which airily lands on your cheek and disappears with a faint puff of magic, leaving you with the tender, blush-inducing sensation of Heather's sweet lips brushing against your skin.
Hehe.♪ Actually, you may or may not be aware already, but every succubus has her own specialty, which we commonly call a 'Kink'.

... Although a Kink isn't always necessary sexual in nature... but it {i}often{/i} is... And of course, regardless of a Kink's inherent applications, most succubi will make lewd use of it in some way or another... But I digress.

Suffice to say that a succubus' Kink is something like her special innate talent. Some have powers focused entirely on kisses, or whispers, or duplicating themselves, or conjuring scaldingly arousing fire... Or sometimes, a Kink can be something broader, like concepts such as 'attraction', or 'hiding', or 'regalness'.

Of course, some can get saddled with less... impressive Kinks, like {i}sparkles{/i}, or bubbles, or paper. There's all kinds of them, each more or less unique to the individual, and they can intermingle and combine with all the skills and magic the succubus has picked up... Or with magic items she may be using, too.♪

You can't help but notice that among all the examples she brought up, she mentioned 'sparkles' with a surprising degree of disdain in her usually jovial voice, though before you can linger on the oddity of it, she gazes at you thoughtfully and speaks up again, her tail idly flicking to one side and brushing through her long locks of hair as she does so.
I bet you're curious about my Kink, aren't you? Well...

The tall woman suddenly leans forward, her confined bust bouncing from the movement and pressing showily against her tight-fitting bodysuit as she opens her eyes to gaze at you with bona fide succubus guile, whispering over to you in a low crooning voice.

And with that, she promptly stands up straight, her breasts once again jiggling eye-catchingly as a result of the sudden motion while she innocently runs a hand through her abundant mane and smiles serenely at you, returning to her usual easygoing professionalism in a heartbeat.
Aaaanywayyyys...♪ I could go on for hours, but we'd {i}really{/i} be straying from what I'm supposed to be here for, so... do you have any other questions, [ThePlayerName]?♪

EventText.NameOfScene: 'You don't seem like the type to work in security.'
theScene: Heather speaks with lazy not-quite-surprise in her nonchalantly lilting voice, as if this was a question she gets asked often.
Well then... I suppose I'm doing my job properly,♪ hehehe.♪

She titters a moment, seeming to relish the air of exoticism and mystery that her profession gives her, though she soon moves on with an understanding smile, clearly not intent on leaving it at just that.
To be fair, I don't blame you, [ThePlayerName]. I know I don't look very serious, or intimidating, or... law-enforcing. Which can be convenient to catch criminals unawares.♪

And to tell you the truth, I didn't always work in security. I actually picked up catering at first, because I had the perfect profile for it, right? Tall, curvy, cheerful, sweet-looking... Perfect to promote yummy food and get people in a good mood.♪
